description_long: This is a pair of athletic sneakers featuring a predominantly white upper with black overlays and accents. The shoes have a layered construction with visible stitching and a thick, textured white sole designed for comfort and grip. The lacing system is standard, with black eyelets and black laces, and the tongue is padded for added support. The heel area displays some branding text, partially visible, and a small red circular detail. The overall design is sporty and modern, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or city streets. The shoes appear to be in good structural condition with minimal visible wear.
description: A pair of white and black athletic sneakers with a thick sole, black laces, and visible branding on the heel. The design is sporty and modern, ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the black laces, layered upper, and thick white sole.
description_view_1: Angled front view highlighting the toe box, black overlays, and padded tongue.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel branding, red circular detail, and the back of the sole.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the heel, side profile, and partial view of the inner lining.
